overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a rural path at night. The journey progresses from open grassland with stone walls past a campfire into a dense birch forest, with atmospheric blue-green lighting and mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland path with stone wall boundary

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the cobblestone path through open meadows

entered.detail: stacked stone wall running alongside the path
wooden fence rails attached to stone posts
tall green grass fields extending into the distance
dark tree line on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a cobblestone path bordered by a stone wall on the right and open meadows on the left. The night sky is partially visible above the distant tree line, and the atmosphere is misty with low light.

scene_state.functional_zone: path passing abandoned campfire and stone ruins

events.description: passing a burning campfire on the left side of the path casting orange light

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path past the campfire and stone ruins

entered.detail: burning campfire with orange flames and embers
broken stone structures and rubble near the campfire

segments.scene_description: The path continues past a burning campfire on the left with stone ruins nearby. The stone wall recedes into the distance as the environment transitions from open meadow to forest edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding forest trail through dense birch and pine woods

events.description: entering dense forest area with birch trees and thicker canopy cover

agents.ego_description: walking deeper into the darkening forest as the path winds through trees

entered.detail: white-barked birch trees lining the left side of the path
thick tree canopy blocking most of the sky

segments.scene_description: The path enters a dense forest with birch trees visible on the left and a thick canopy overhead. The lighting becomes darker and more enclosed as Geralt continues walking deeper into the woods.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural night path that transitions from open, misty meadows into the oppressive enclosure of a dense forest. It begins with Geralt walking along a cobblestone path bordered by a stone wall and wide grasslands under a dim, hazy sky. As the camera moves forward, the open terrain gives way to the edge of the woods, passing a flickering campfire and weathered stone ruins on the left. The scene then shifts as the stone wall recedes and the path enters a thicket of birch trees, with the overhead canopy gradually blocking out the night sky. Finally, the lighting grows darker and more claustrophobic as the camera follows Geralt deeper into the heart of the woods.
